title: useDialog
description: A hook for managing dialog states and behaviors, including open, close, and toggle logic.
summary: Manages state and actions for dialog components.

body.raw:
## API References

### Props API

| Props API         | Type                                           | Default                          | Annotation                                                                                                          |
| ----------------- | ---------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| keepMounted`?`    | `boolean`                                      | ``                               | If set element will not be unmounted from the DOM when it is hidden, `display: none` styles will be applied instead |
| transition`?`     | `Transition`                                   | ``                               | Transition name or object                                                                                           |
| duration`?`       | `number`                                       | `250`                            | Transition duration in ms                                                                                           |
| exitDuration`?`   | `number`                                       | `250`                            | Exit transition duration in ms                                                                                      |
| timingFunction`?` | `string`                                       | `theme.transitionTimingFunction` | Transition timing function                                                                                          |
| mounted`?`        | `boolean`                                      | ``                               | Determines whether component should be mounted to the DOM                                                           |
| children`?`       | `(styles: CSSProperties) => React.JSX.Element` | ``                               | Render function with transition styles argument                                                                     |
| onExited`?`       | `() => void`                                   | ``                               | Called when exit transition ends                                                                                    |
| onExit`?`         | `() => void`                                   | ``                               | Called when exit transition starts                                                                                  |
| onEnter`?`        | `() => void`                                   | ``                               | Called when enter transition starts                                                                                 |
| onEntered`?`      | `() => void`                                   | ``                               | Called when enter transition ends                                                                                   |
| enterDelay`?`     | `number`                                       | ``                               | Delay in ms before enter transition starts                                                                          |
| exitDelay`?`      | `number`                                       | ``                               | Delay in ms before exit transition starts                                                                           |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

`,(0,r.jsx)(e,{name:"use-dialog",code:`"use client";\r
import React from "react";\r
import ReactDOM from "react-dom";\r
import { useDidUpdate } from "@/hooks/use-did-update";\r
import { useWindowEvent } from "@/hooks/use-window-event";\r
import { useReducedMotion } from "@/hooks/use-reduced-motion";\r
import { useId } from "@/hooks/use-id";\r
import { rem } from "xuxi";\r
\r
type CSSProperties = React.CSSProperties & { [key: string]: any };\r
interface TransitionProps {\r
  keepMounted?: boolean;\r
  transition?: Transition;\r
  duration?: number;\r
  exitDuration?: number;\r
  timingFunction?: string;\r
  mounted: boolean;\r
  children: (styles: CSSProperties) => React.JSX.Element;\r
  onExited?: () => void;\r
  onExit?: () => void;\r
  onEnter?: () => void;\r
  onEntered?: () => void;\r
  enterDelay?: number;\r
  exitDelay?: number;\r
}\r
export type TransitionOverride = Partial<Omit<TransitionProps, "mounted">>;\r
interface UseDialogOptions {\r
  open: boolean;\r
  onClose: () => void;\r
  id: string | undefined;\r
  transitionProps: TransitionOverride | undefined;\r
  trapFocus: boolean | undefined;\r
  closeOnEscape: boolean | undefined;\r
  returnFocus: boolean | undefined;\r
}\r
export interface TransitionStyles {\r
  common?: React.CSSProperties;\r
  in: React.CSSProperties;\r
  out: React.CSSProperties;\r
  transitionProperty: React.CSSProperties["transitionProperty"];\r
}\r
export type TransitionName =\r
  "fade" | "fade-down" | "fade-up" | "fade-left" | "fade-right" | "skew-up" | "skew-down" | "rotate-right" | "rotate-left" | "slide-down" | "slide-up" | "slide-right" | "slide-left" | "scale-y" | "scale-x" | "scale" | "pop" | "pop-top-left" | "pop-top-right" | "pop-bottom-left" | "pop-bottom-right";\r
\r
export type Transition = TransitionName | TransitionStyles;\r
\r
export function useDialog(options: UseDialogOptions) {\r
  const { id, transitionProps, open, trapFocus, closeOnEscape, onClose, returnFocus } = options;\r
  const _id = useId(id);\r
  const [titleMounted, setTitleMounted] = React.useState(false);\r
  const [bodyMounted, setBodyMounted] = React.useState(false);\r
\r
  const transitionDuration = typeof transitionProps?.duration === "number" ? transitionProps?.duration : 200;\r
\r
  const shouldLockScroll = useLockScroll({ open, transitionDuration });\r
\r
  useWindowEvent(\r
    "keydown",\r
    event => {\r
      if (event.key === "Escape" && closeOnEscape) {\r
        const shouldTrigger = (event.target as HTMLElement)?.getAttribute("data-stop-propagation") !== "true";\r
        if (shouldTrigger) onClose();\r
      }\r
    },\r
    { capture: true }\r
  );\r
\r
  useFocusReturn({ open, shouldReturnFocus: trapFocus && returnFocus });\r
\r
  return {\r
    _id,\r
    titleMounted,\r
    bodyMounted,\r
    shouldLockScroll,\r
    setTitleMounted,\r
    setBodyMounted\r
  };\r
}\r
\r
interface UseScrollLockOptions {\r
  open: boolean;\r
  transitionDuration: number;\r
}\r
\r
export function useLockScroll(options: UseScrollLockOptions) {\r
  const { open, transitionDuration } = options;\r
  const [shouldLockScroll, setShouldLockScroll] = React.useState(open);\r
  const timeout = React.useRef<number>(0);\r
  const reduceMotion = useReducedMotion();\r
  const _transitionDuration = reduceMotion ? 0 : transitionDuration;\r
\r
  React.useEffect(() => {\r
    if (open) {\r
      setShouldLockScroll(true);\r
      window.clearTimeout(timeout.current);\r
    } else if (_transitionDuration === 0) {\r
      setShouldLockScroll(false);\r
    } else {\r
      timeout.current = window.setTimeout(() => setShouldLockScroll(false), _transitionDuration);\r
    }\r
\r
    return () => window.clearTimeout(timeout.current);\r
  }, [open, _transitionDuration]);\r
\r
  return shouldLockScroll;\r
}\r
\r
interface UseFocusReturnOptions {\r
  open: boolean;\r
  shouldReturnFocus?: boolean;\r
}\r
\r
/** Returns focus to last active element, used in Dialog */\r
export function useFocusReturn(options: UseFocusReturnOptions) {\r
  const { open, shouldReturnFocus = true } = options;\r
  const lastActiveElement = React.useRef<HTMLElement>(null);\r
  const returnFocus = () => {\r
    if (lastActiveElement.current && "focus" in lastActiveElement.current && typeof lastActiveElement.current.focus === "function") {\r
      lastActiveElement.current?.focus({ preventScroll: true });\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  useDidUpdate(() => {\r
    let timeout = -1;\r
\r
    const clearFocusTimeout = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {\r
      if (event.key === "Tab") {\r
        window.clearTimeout(timeout);\r
      }\r
    };\r
\r
    document.addEventListener("keydown", clearFocusTimeout);\r
\r
    if (open) {\r
      lastActiveElement.current = document.activeElement as HTMLElement;\r
    } else if (shouldReturnFocus) {\r
      timeout = window.setTimeout(returnFocus, 10);\r
    }\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      window.clearTimeout(timeout);\r
      document.removeEventListener("keydown", clearFocusTimeout);\r
    };\r
  }, [open, shouldReturnFocus]);\r
\r
  return returnFocus;\r
}\r
\r
export type TransitionStatus = "entered" | "exited" | "entering" | "exiting" | "pre-exiting" | "pre-entering";\r
\r
interface Options {\r
  duration: number;\r
  exitDuration: number;\r
  timingFunction: string;\r
  mounted: boolean;\r
  onEnter?: () => void;\r
  onExit?: () => void;\r
  onEntered?: () => void;\r
  onExited?: () => void;\r
  enterDelay?: number;\r
  exitDelay?: number;\r
}\r
\r
export function useTransition(options: Options) {\r
  const { duration, exitDuration, timingFunction, mounted, onEnter, onExit, onEntered, onExited, enterDelay, exitDelay } = options;\r
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();\r
  const reduceMotion = shouldReduceMotion;\r
  const [transitionDuration, setTransitionDuration] = React.useState(reduceMotion ? 0 : duration);\r
  const [transitionStatus, setStatus] = React.useState<TransitionStatus>(mounted ? "entered" : "exited");\r
  const transitionTimeoutRef = React.useRef<number>(-1);\r
  const delayTimeoutRef = React.useRef<number>(-1);\r
  const rafRef = React.useRef(-1);\r
\r
  const handleStateChange = (shouldMount: boolean) => {\r
    const preHandler = shouldMount ? onEnter : onExit;\r
    const handler = shouldMount ? onEntered : onExited;\r
\r
    window.clearTimeout(transitionTimeoutRef.current);\r
\r
    const newTransitionDuration = reduceMotion ? 0 : shouldMount ? duration : exitDuration;\r
    setTransitionDuration(newTransitionDuration);\r
\r
    if (newTransitionDuration === 0) {\r
      if (typeof preHandler === "function") preHandler();\r
      if (typeof handler === "function") handler();\r
      setStatus(shouldMount ? "entered" : "exited");\r
    } else {\r
      // Make sure new status won't be set within the same frame as this would disrupt animation #3126\r
      rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(() => {\r
        ReactDOM.flushSync(() => {\r
          setStatus(shouldMount ? "pre-entering" : "pre-exiting");\r
        });\r
\r
        rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(() => {\r
          if (typeof preHandler === "function") preHandler();\r
          setStatus(shouldMount ? "entering" : "exiting");\r
\r
          transitionTimeoutRef.current = window.setTimeout(() => {\r
            if (typeof handler === "function") handler();\r
            setStatus(shouldMount ? "entered" : "exited");\r
          }, newTransitionDuration);\r
        });\r
      });\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  const handleTransitionWithDelay = (shouldMount: boolean) => {\r
    window.clearTimeout(delayTimeoutRef.current);\r
    const delay = shouldMount ? enterDelay : exitDelay;\r
\r
    if (typeof delay !== "number") {\r
      handleStateChange(shouldMount);\r
      return;\r
    }\r
\r
    delayTimeoutRef.current = window.setTimeout(\r
      () => {\r
        handleStateChange(shouldMount);\r
      },\r
      shouldMount ? enterDelay : exitDelay\r
    );\r
  };\r
\r
  useDidUpdate(() => {\r
    handleTransitionWithDelay(mounted);\r
  }, [mounted]);\r
\r
  React.useEffect(\r
    () => () => {\r
      window.clearTimeout(transitionTimeoutRef.current);\r
      cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);\r
    },\r
    []\r
  );\r
\r
  return {\r
    transitionDuration,\r
    transitionStatus,\r
    transitionTimingFunction: timingFunction || "ease"\r
  };\r
}\r
\r
const popIn = (from: "top" | "bottom") => ({\r
  in: { opacity: 1, transform: "scale(1)" },\r
  out: {\r
    opacity: 0,\r
    transform: \`scale(.9) translateY(\${rem(from === "bottom" ? 10 : -10)})\`\r
  },\r
  transitionProperty: "transform, opacity"\r
});\r
\r
export const transitions: Record<TransitionName, TransitionStyles> = {\r
  fade: {\r
    in: { opacity: 1 },\r
    out: { opacity: 0 },\r
    transitionProperty: "opacity"\r
  },\r
\r
  "fade-up": {\r
    in: { opacity: 1, transform: "translateY(0)" },\r
    out: { opacity: 0, transform: \`translateY(\${rem(30)}\` },\r
    transitionProperty: "opacity, transform"\r
  },\r
\r
  "fade-down": {\r
    in: { opacity: 1, transform: "translateY(0)" },\r
    out: { opacity: 0, transform: \`translateY(\${rem(-30)}\` },\r
    transitionProperty: "opacity, transform"\r
  },\r
\r
  "fade-left": {\r
    in: { opacity: 1, transform: "translateX(0)" },\r
    out: { opacity: 0, transform: \`translateX(\${rem(30)}\` },\r
    transitionProperty: "opacity, transform"\r
  },\r
\r
  "fade-right": {\r
    in: { opacity: 1, transform: "translateX(0)" },\r
    out: { opacity: 0, transform: \`translateX(\${rem(-30)}\` },\r
    transitionProperty: "opacity, transform"\r
  },\r
\r
  scale: {\r
    in: { opacity: 1, transform: "scale(1)" },\r
    out: { opacity: 0, transform: "scale(0)" },\r
    common: { transformOrigin: "top" },\r
    transitionProperty: "transform, opacity"\r
  },\r
\r
  "scale-y": {\r
    in: { opacity: 1, transform: "scaleY(1)" },\r
    out: { opacity: 0, transform: "scaleY(0)" },\r
    common: { transformOrigin: "top" },\r
    transitionProperty: "transform, opacity"\r
  },\r
\r
  "scale-x": {\r
    in: { opacity: 1, transform: "scaleX(1)" },\r
    out: { opacity: 0, transform: "scaleX(0)" },\r
    common: { transformOrigin: "left" },\r
    transitionProperty: "transform, opacity"\r
  },\r
\r
  "skew-up": {\r
    in: { opacity: 1, transform: "translateY(0) skew(0deg, 0deg)" },\r
    out: {\r
      opacity: 0,\r
      transform: \`translateY(\${rem(-20)}) skew(-10deg, -5deg)\`\r
    },\r
    common: { transformOrigin: "top" },\r
    transitionProperty: "transform, opacity"\r
  },\r
\r
  "skew-down": {\r
    in: { opacity: 1, transform: "translateY(0) skew(0deg, 0deg)" },\r
    out: {\r
      opacity: 0,\r
      transform: \`translateY(\${rem(20)}) skew(-10deg, -5deg)\`\r
    },\r
    common: { transformOrigin: "bottom" },\r
    transitionProperty: "transform, opacity"\r
  },\r
\r
  "rotate-left": {\r
    in: { opacity: 1, transform: "translateY(0) rotate(0deg)" },\r
    out: { opacity: 0, transform: \`translateY(\${rem(20)}) rotate(-5deg)\` },\r
    common: { transformOrigin: "bottom" },\r
    transitionProperty: "transform, opacity"\r
  },\r
\r
  "rotate-right": {\r
    in: { opacity: 1, transform: "translateY(0) rotate(0deg)" },\r
    out: { opacity: 0, transform: \`translateY(\${rem(20)}) rotate(5deg)\` },\r
    common: { transformOrigin: "top" },\r
    transitionProperty: "transform, opacity"\r
  },\r
\r
  "slide-down": {\r
    in: { opacity: 1, transform: "translateY(0)" },\r
    out: { opacity: 0, transform: "translateY(-100%)" },\r
    common: { transformOrigin: "top" },\r
    transitionProperty: "transform, opacity"\r
